Notice And Motion To Strike Portions Of Pltf'S Complaint Re: Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS JACLYNNE ROBERTS AND 1997 JACLYNNE ROBERTS LIVING TRUST'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff's Complaint Re: Punitive Damages is granted with leave to amend. DENIED AS TO PARAGRAPH 16 LINES 12-25. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 =301/PHA
